items.statcast_observation: Nick Loftin produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 105.1 mph at a 8.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Detroit Tigers, KC 3, DET 4. Randy Dobnak led the night, working 5.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 3 strikeouts and 1 walk. Nick Loftin supplied the loudest Royals contact at 105.1 mph.
items.title: Royals at Tigers Recap
